scripts.hooks:install: git config core.hooksPath scripts/git-hooks && echo '✓ pre-commit + pre-push hooks active'
scripts.verify: node --check src/sw-update.js && python3 scripts/check-version-sync.py && python3 scripts/check-brace-balance.py && python3 scripts/check-innerhtml.py && python3 scripts/check-innerhtml-pieces.py && HARRISON_HEBREW_BASELINE=0 node scripts/harrison-hebrew-baseline.cjs --strict && vitest run
